query: ("weather forecast" OR "meteorological forecast" OR "heat forecast" OR "temperature forecast" OR "early warning system" OR "heat alert" OR "heat advisory" OR "weather warning" OR "cooling center" OR "cooling shelter" OR "heat refuge" OR "cooling site" OR "air conditioning center" OR "emergency shelter" OR "public cooling" OR "heat intervention" OR "heat prevention program" OR "climate adaptation strategy") AND ("heat-health" OR "temperature-mortality" OR "heat-related death" OR "thermal stress" OR hyperthermia OR "heat illness" OR "heat stroke" OR "heat exhaustion" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat wave" OR "excess mortality" OR "heat-related morbidity" OR "temperature-health" OR "climate-health") AND ((randomized OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "difference-in-difference" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "instrumental variable" OR "causal inference" OR "impact evaluation" OR "before-after" OR "interrupted time series" OR "controlled study" OR "intervention study") OR (effectiveness AND (evaluation OR assessment OR study OR analysis)) OR (impact AND (evaluation OR assessment OR study)))
